title: ctenanthe lanceolata
intro: Ctenanthe lanceolata, also known as the Upright Calathea or Nianfou, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is known for its attractive, lance-shaped leaves with bright green and yellow stripes, making it a popular choice for indoor decoration. Ctenanthe lanceolata has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and its leaves have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to have health benefits like reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
